text.title: Segment-Aware Design System Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end with explicit decision-gates.

step.name: define-segments
step.action: List ≤5 segments with id + label + tone; record in design-system repo.

step.name: add-segment-token-dimension
step.action: Extend Style Dictionary build with segment dimension; emit per-segment CSS vars.

step.name: retrofit-components
step.action: Add `segment` prop to each variant-needing component; map to token vars.

step.name: move-copy-to-i18n
step.action: Extract per-segment copy to i18n bundles keyed by (locale, segment).

step.name: publish-and-document
step.action: Update Storybook with segment switcher; document segment dimension in DS docs.
